mapper.update: UPDATE BT_BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE IDX = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BT_BOARD(IDX, USERNAME, ROLE, LECTURE, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, ATTACHED_DATA, ATTACHED_DATA2, ATTACHED_DATA3, BOARD_GROUP, BOARD_SEQUENCE, BOARD_LEVEL, BOARD_AVAILABLE) SELECT IFNULL(MAX(IDX) + 1, 1) , #{username}, #{role}, #{lecture}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{attached_data}, #{attached_data2}, #{attached_data3}, IFNULL(MAX(IDX) + 1, 1), 0, 0, 1 FROM BT_BOARD

SELECT IFNULL(MAX(IDX) + 1, 1) as idx, IFNULL(MAX(BOARD_GROUP) + 1, 1) as board_group FROM BT_BOARD
INSERT INTO BT_BOARD(IDX, USERNAME, ROLE, LECTURE, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, ATTACHED_DATA, ATTACHED_DATA2, ATTACHED_DATA3, BOARD_GROUP, BOARD_SEQUENCE, BOARD_LEVEL, BOARD_AVAILABLE) VALUES(#{idx}, #{username}, #{role}, #{lecture}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{attached_data}, #{attached_data2}, #{attached_data3}, #{board_group}, 0, 0, 1)

SELECT IFNULL(MAX(IDX) + 1, 1) as idx FROM BT_BOARD
INSERT INTO BT_BOARD(IDX, USERNAME, ROLE, LECTURE, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, ATTACHED_DATA, ATTACHED_DATA2, ATTACHED_DATA3, BOARD_GROUP, BOARD_SEQUENCE, BOARD_LEVEL, BOARD_AVAILABLE) VALUES(#{idx}, #{username}, #{role}, #{lecture}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{attached_data}, #{attached_data2}, #{attached_data3}, #{board_group}, #{board_sequence}, #{board_level}, 1)
